confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete Agent "{{name}}"?

primary.title: Primary Agent
primary.subtitle: Directly interacts with users, analyzes tasks and coordinates sub-agents

sub.title: Sub-Agents
sub.subtitle: Specialized executors scheduled by the primary agent, each handling specific tasks

form.name: Name
form.descriptionHint: Used for delegation and model context; English by convention
form.descriptionCnPlaceholder: Optional Chinese label for the UI
form.enabledTip: Allow the primary agent to delegate to this sub-agent
form.disabledTip: Prevent the primary agent from delegating to this sub-agent
form.nativeReadOnlyMessage: Built-in agents only support editing the model, temperature, and sub-agent enabled state; other settings are maintained by the system

error.extractTimeout: Extraction timed out. Please ask Rex to output the configuration in JSON format in the conversation, then try again.

create.guidePanelDesc: Choose a guide or case. Rex will load the agent-builder skill first, confirm name, role, boundaries, and strategy, then generate files.

guideActions.label: How to Create
guideActions.description: Start from name, role, boundaries, strategy, and tool allowlist.
guideActions.prompt: Please follow the .flocks/plugins/skills/agent-builder skill to guide me through creating a Flocks sub-agent. Do not write files yet. Use the question tool to ask one most important question at a time and help me clarify agent name, role description, capability boundaries, execution strategy, tool allowlist, output format, and avoid cases. After I confirm, generate ~/.flocks/plugins/agents/<name>/agent.yaml and prompt.md, and show a plan before writing.

guideActions.label: Clarify Boundaries
guideActions.description: Turn a fuzzy need into delegatable agent description and triggers.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me clarify the sub-agent's responsibility boundaries so the agent-builder skill can create it. Ask one question at a time to confirm: what task it solves, when Rex should delegate to it, what it must not do, required tools, whether it is read-only, output format, and acceptance checks.

guideActions.label: Choose Strategy
guideActions.description: Choose among read_only, react, plan_and_execute, and explore.
guideActions.prompt: Please use the agent-builder skill to help me choose an execution strategy for this sub-agent. First confirm task risk, whether it needs file writes, command execution, codebase exploration, or web lookup, then recommend read_only, react, plan_and_execute, or explore with an appropriate tool allowlist.

guideActions.label: Design Prompt
guideActions.description: Create a reusable system prompt with output format and constraints.
guideActions.prompt: Please help me design the sub-agent prompt.md. First confirm role, mission, capability list, output format, constraints, and example invocation scenarios. Do not write files until I confirm. After confirmation, draft prompt.md using the agent-builder skill template.

caseActions.label: Threat Intel Agent
caseActions.description: Look up IOC reputation, correlate context, and produce an assessment report.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create a threat intelligence sub-agent for IP, domain, URL, and hash analysis. It should call existing intelligence tools in this project and output a structured assessment report. Please follow the agent-builder skill to guide me through name, tool allowlist, read-only boundaries, output format, and applicable scenarios.

caseActions.label: Code Review Agent
caseActions.description: Read-only review of code risks, regressions, and missing tests.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create a code review sub-agent for read-only review of bugs, regression risks, security risks, and test gaps in code changes. Please follow the agent-builder skill to guide me through responsibility, read_only strategy, tool allowlist, and output format.

caseActions.label: Log Analysis Agent
caseActions.description: Analyze security logs, extract key events, anomalies, and response suggestions.
caseActions.prompt: I want to create a log analysis sub-agent that reads security logs, identifies anomalous patterns, summarizes key events, and provides response recommendations. Please follow the agent-builder skill to guide me through input format, tool permissions, analysis steps, and final output structure.

chat.subtitle: Describe your needs through conversation, AI generates configuration automatically
chat.placeholder: Describe the Agent you want to create... (Enter to send)
